title: RSA 1:5. Perambulation of the New Hampshire-Massachusetts State Line.
text:
The perambulation of the boundary line between the state of New Hampshire and the Commonwealth of Massachusetts shall be as established and marked on land under the provisions of 1901, 115:1.

Source: Source. 2000, 35:1, eff. Jan. 1, 2001.
title_name: TITLE I THE STATE AND ITS GOVERNMENT
